checklist.title: Tap a habit to log it
checklist.body: Your daily list is one tap per habit. Resets each morning. The completion ring at the top fills as you go.

hearts.title: Three hearts a fortnight
hearts.body: Each day under 50% completion costs a heart. Three consecutive days at 50% or more earns one back. Lose all three and the app nudges you to restart smaller.

futureSelf.title: Your future self is real
futureSelf.body: Every habit you keep is a vote for who you're becoming. Future Self shows the person you're growing into — plus the compound effect of each habit over a year and a decade.

workspaces.title: Track together, when you want
workspaces.body: Create a workspace to share habits with a partner, family, or small group. Everyone sees the same list; each person logs their own. Optional — your personal habits stay private by default.

explore.title: Make it yours
explore.body: Categories, books, dopamine resets, fasting timers, the anger protocol — explore from the menu when you're ready. Nothing's required. The app waits for you.
